title: ClarificationQuestion
description: An AskUser clarification question derived from an ambiguity in the draft Intent (agency/capabilities/discover/clusters/clarify.py; Spec 311 + Spec 153 Slice 6 workflow-spine coverage). Links CLARIFIES→Intent; answered via fold_answer.

text.description: The question text surfaced to the user.

options.description: Choice options derived from the Intent's context (2-4 items, recommended-first).

ambiguity_kind.description: Which ambiguity signal this question resolves.

status.description: Pending until fold_answer is called; answered after the user's response is folded in.
